_what: Single-direction ablation on Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct. Tests whether a rank-1 LoRA on down_proj only (Family B) suffices to induce the user-turn coinflip flip, with the canonical Family A rank-32 general LoRAs (all 7 LoRA targets, alpha=64) shown alongside for context. This is NOT a clean rank ablation — Family A and Family B differ in rank AND LoRA-target set AND lora_alpha. The question is whether a single-direction perturbation can induce the flip at all.
_models: ModelOrganismsForEM/Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct_extreme-sports (Family A canonical: rank-32, all 7 targets, alpha=64)
